name: microfrontends-demo
description: A complete microfrontends project demonstrating Module Federation with React

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd shell && npm install && cd ../header-mf && npm install && cd ../products-mf && npm install
scripts.start:all: concurrently "npm run start:header" "npm run start:products" "npm run start:shell"
scripts.build:all: cd shell && npm run build && cd ../header-mf && npm run build && cd ../products-mf && npm run build
scripts.setup: echo 'Run the following commands to recreate the microfrontends demo:' && echo '1. npm run create:structure' && echo '2. npm run install:all' && echo '3. npm run start:all'
scripts.create:structure: echo 'This command would recreate the project structure - check README.md for manual setup instructions'
